introSection: Spinning Surfboat was a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster previously located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guandong, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster had an oval layout, with a single spinning car which was propelled by friction wheels. Originally painted blue with yellow supports. During 2018, the track was repainted yellow and the supports green.

fullText:
Spinning Surfboat was a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster previously located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guandong, China.

This roller coaster had an oval layout, with a single spinning car which was propelled by friction wheels. Originally painted blue with yellow supports. During 2018, the track was repainted yellow and the supports green.
